title: pelargonium × salebrosum
intro: Pelargonium × salebrosum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are due to the presence of compounds like geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and skin issues. Rose Geranium can be consumed as a herbal tea, or used in aromatherapy preparations, such as essential oils and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
